attribution.pr: AI-assisted: requires human review before merging

hooks.command: cd $CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR && [TEST_COMMAND] 2>&1 | tail -5; [[ ${PIPESTATUS[0]} -ne 0 ]] && echo '{"decision": "block", "reason": "Tests must pass before completing the task. Fix failing tests first."}'

jq -nc --arg ts "$(date -u +%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ)" --arg tool "$CLAUDE_TOOL_NAME" --arg input "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT" '{timestamp: $ts, tool: $tool, input: ($input | .[:200])}' >> ~/.claude/audit/$(basename $CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR).jsonl 2>/dev/null || true

LAST=$(cat ~/.claude/projects/$(echo $CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR | tr '/' '-' | sed 's/^-//')/last-audit 2>/dev/null || echo 0); NOW=$(date +%s); DIFF=$((NOW - LAST)); if [ $DIFF -gt 604800 ]; then DAYS=$((DIFF / 86400)); LAST_DATE=$([ $LAST -eq 0 ] && echo 'never' || date -r $LAST '+%Y-%m-%d' 2>/dev/null || echo 'unknown'); echo "⚠️  Arch audit overdue — last run: $LAST_DATE (${DAYS}d ago). Run /arch-audit to check compliance with latest Anthropic docs."; fi
[ -f .claude/CLAUDE.local.md ] && echo '⚠️  Active .claude/CLAUDE.local.md overrides in effect — re-read to restore session context.' || true
